mapper.select: select ( select count(1) from payment_cashier_config c where c.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and c.application_id = #{applicationId} and c.del_flag = 0 ) + ( select count(1) from payment_business_order bo where bo.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and bo.del_flag = 0 and bo.app_code in (#{appId}, #{legacyAppCode}) ) + ( select count(1) from payment_order po join payment_business_order bo on bo.id = po.business_order_id and bo.tenant_id = po.tenant_id where po.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and bo.del_flag = 0 and bo.app_code in (#{appId}, #{legacyAppCode}) ) + ( select count(1) from payment_refund_order ro join payment_order po on po.id = ro.payment_order_id and po.tenant_id = ro.tenant_id join payment_business_order bo on bo.id = po.business_order_id and bo.tenant_id = po.tenant_id where ro.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and bo.del_flag = 0 and bo.app_code in (#{appId}, #{legacyAppCode}) ) + ( select count(distinct tf.id) from payment_transaction_flow tf left join payment_business_order bo1 on bo1.id = tf.business_order_id and bo1.tenant_id = tf.tenant_id left join payment_order po on po.id = tf.payment_order_id and po.tenant_id = tf.tenant_id left join payment_business_order bo2 on bo2.id = po.business_order_id and bo2.tenant_id = po.tenant_id left join payment_refund_order ro on ro.id = tf.refund_order_id and ro.tenant_id = tf.tenant_id left join payment_order rpo on rpo.id = ro.payment_order_id and rpo.tenant_id = ro.tenant_id left join payment_business_order bo3 on bo3.id = rpo.business_order_id and bo3.tenant_id = rpo.tenant_id where tf.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and ( bo1.app_code in (#{appId}, #{legacyAppCode}) or bo2.app_code in (#{appId}, #{legacyAppCode}) or bo3.app_code in (#{appId}, #{legacyAppCode}) ) ) + ( select count(1) from payment_exception_order eo where eo.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and eo.del_flag = 0 and ( exists ( select 1 from payment_business_order bo where bo.tenant_id = eo.tenant_id and bo.del_flag = 0 and bo.app_code in (#{appId}, #{legacyAppCode}) and bo.biz_order_no = eo.related_order_no ) or exists ( select 1 from payment_order po join payment_business_order bo on bo.id = po.business_order_id and bo.tenant_id = po.tenant_id where po.tenant_id = eo.tenant_id and bo.del_flag = 0 and bo.app_code in (#{appId}, #{legacyAppCode}) and po.pay_order_no = eo.related_order_no ) or exists ( select 1 from payment_refund_order ro join payment_order po on po.id = ro.payment_order_id and po.tenant_id = ro.tenant_id join payment_business_order bo on bo.id = po.business_order_id and bo.tenant_id = po.tenant_id where ro.tenant_id = eo.tenant_id and bo.del_flag = 0 and bo.app_code in (#{appId}, #{legacyAppCode}) and ro.refund_order_no = eo.related_order_no ) ) ) + ( select count(1) from payment_notification_record nr where nr.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and nr.del_flag = 0 and ( exists ( select 1 from payment_business_order bo where bo.tenant_id = nr.tenant_id and bo.del_flag = 0 and bo.app_code in (#{appId}, #{legacyAppCode}) and bo.biz_order_no = nr.related_order_no ) or exists ( select 1 from payment_order po join payment_business_order bo on bo.id = po.business_order_id and bo.tenant_id = po.tenant_id where po.tenant_id = nr.tenant_id and bo.del_flag = 0 and bo.app_code in (#{appId}, #{legacyAppCode}) and po.pay_order_no = nr.related_order_no ) or exists ( select 1 from payment_refund_order ro join payment_order po on po.id = ro.payment_order_id and po.tenant_id = ro.tenant_id join payment_business_order bo on bo.id = po.business_order_id and bo.tenant_id = po.tenant_id where ro.tenant_id = nr.tenant_id and bo.del_flag = 0 and bo.app_code in (#{appId}, #{legacyAppCode}) and ro.refund_order_no = nr.related_order_no ) ) ) + ( select count(1) from payment_difference pd where pd.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and pd.del_flag = 0 and ( exists ( select 1 from payment_business_order bo where bo.tenant_id = pd.tenant_id and bo.del_flag = 0 and bo.app_code in (#{appId}, #{legacyAppCode}) and bo.biz_order_no = pd.related_order_no ) or exists ( select 1 from payment_order po join payment_business_order bo on bo.id = po.business_order_id and bo.tenant_id = po.tenant_id where po.tenant_id = pd.tenant_id and bo.del_flag = 0 and bo.app_code in (#{appId}, #{legacyAppCode}) and po.pay_order_no = pd.related_order_no ) or exists ( select 1 from payment_refund_order ro join payment_order po on po.id = ro.payment_order_id and po.tenant_id = ro.tenant_id join payment_business_order bo on bo.id = po.business_order_id and bo.tenant_id = po.tenant_id where ro.tenant_id = pd.tenant_id and bo.del_flag = 0 and bo.app_code in (#{appId}, #{legacyAppCode}) and ro.refund_order_no = pd.related_order_no ) ) ) + ( select count(1) from payment_difference pd join payment_notification_record nr on nr.notification_no = pd.related_order_no and nr.tenant_id = pd.tenant_id where pd.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and pd.del_flag = 0 and nr.del_flag = 0 and ( exists ( select 1 from payment_order po join payment_business_order bo on bo.id = po.business_order_id and bo.tenant_id = po.tenant_id where po.tenant_id = nr.tenant_id and bo.del_flag = 0 and bo.app_code in (#{appId}, #{legacyAppCode}) and po.pay_order_no = nr.related_order_no ) or exists ( select 1 from payment_business_order bo where bo.tenant_id = nr.tenant_id and bo.del_flag = 0 and bo.app_code in (#{appId}, #{legacyAppCode}) and bo.biz_order_no = nr.related_order_no ) ) )
